heading: Copyright Royalty Tribunal; computation and disbursement of pay of Tribunal personnel by Library of Congress
label: 142g Copyright Royalty Tribunal; computation and disbursement of pay of Tribunal personnel by Library of Congress
text: From and after , the Library of Congress is authorized to compute and disburse basic pay of all personnel of the Copyright Royalty Tribunal pursuant to the provisions of .October 1, 1983section 5504 of title 5
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub.
